recalls.Description:
Avenco and Novilla have issued a recall for their mattresses due to non-compliance with mandatory flammability standards, which poses a significant risk of fire-related injuries or fatalities. The affected mattresses come in various thicknesses (6, 10, 12, and 14 inches) and sizes (twin, full, queen, and king), featuring a white cover with an accent color that varies by model. Each mattress is labeled with the manufacturer name 'PT Champion', along with the model number, thickness, size, and the manufacturing date in the format YYYYMMDD-GJ.

Model numbers include A-M02822-10-Q-2, A-M02822-12-K-2, B-M02901-14-Q-1, B-M02905-6-T, and N-M02043-12-F-2. Some models have distinctive tags sewn into the side, with navy tags for Avenco mattresses and green tags for Novilla mattresses. Consumers are urged to stop using these mattresses immediately to prevent potential hazards.
recalls.Title: Recall of Avenco and Novilla Mattresses Due to Fire Hazard Violations
recalls.ConsumerContact: For assistance, please contact PT Champion via email at recall@champmattress.com or visit https://www.novilla.net/pages/recall or https://www.avencohome.com/pages/recall. You can also find more information by visiting https://www.novilla.net or https://www.avencohome.com and clicking on 'Recall' at the bottom of the page.

Images.Caption: Recalled Avenco A-M02822-10-Q-2 Mattress
Recalled Avenco A-M02822-12-K-2 Mattress
Recalled Avenco & Novilla B-M02901-14-Q-1 Mattress
Recalled Avenco & Novilla B-M02905-6-T Mattress
Recalled Novilla N-M02043-12-F-2 Mattress
Labeling on the side seam of Mattress

Manufacturers.Name: PT Champion Mattress Indonesia Manufacturing, of Indonesia

Hazards.Name: Fire hazard due to flammability standard violations

Remedies.Name: Free fitted cover to ensure compliance with flammability standards

recalls.metaDescription: Avenco and Novilla recall mattresses due to fire hazard. Stop using immediately and contact for a free fitted cover.

recalls.Description: The DINBooonLUX 12-Inch Full Size Hybrid Mattresses have been recalled due to a serious fire hazard, as they do not meet mandatory flammability standards. These mattresses, featuring a white top and blue sides, are labeled with "DINBooonLUX" on a blue tag and include manufacturing details on a white label. The product poses a risk of severe injury or death from fire.
recalls.Title: DINBooonLUX 12-Inch Full Size Hybrid Mattresses Recalled Due to Flammability Risks
recalls.ConsumerContact: For assistance, consumers should contact DINBooonLUX via email at Dingbangrecall2025@outlook.com.

Images.Caption: Recalled DINBooonLUX 12-Inch Full Size Hybrid Mattress
Labeling on the side seam of Mattress

Retailers.Name: Available on Amazon from February 2025 to September 2025 for approximately $160.

Distributors.Name: Huizhou Dingbang E-Commerce Co., Ltd. dba DINBooonLUX, of China

Hazards.Name: Flammability risk leading to potential serious injury or death from fire.

Remedies.Name: Stop using the mattress immediately and contact DINBooonLUX for a full refund. Mark the mattress as "Recalled" with a permanent marker, email a photo of the marked mattress to Dingbangrecall2025@outlook.com, and confirm disposal. A full refund will be issued upon receipt of the photo and disposal certification.

recalls.metaDescription: DINBooonLUX recalls 12-Inch Full Size Hybrid Mattresses due to fire hazards. Immediate action required for refunds.

recalls.Description:
Amazon is recalling its Premium Foam Eurotop Mattresses due to a serious fire hazard that violates federal flammability standards. These mattresses, available in twin, full, queen, and king sizes, feature a white top panel and a gray side panel, with an Amazon Basics tag located on the foot panel. They were produced between December 22, 2022, and May 16, 2024, and include specific model identifiers on a label found on the center seam of the foot panel.

Consumers are urged to stop using these mattresses immediately and follow the outlined steps for obtaining a full refund. This includes marking the mattress as
recalls.Title: Amazon Recalls Amazon Basics Premium Foam Eurotop Mattresses Due to Fire Hazard
recalls.ConsumerContact: Contact Amazon at 800-913-4350 from 8 a.m. to 5 p.m. ET, Monday through Friday, or visit http://amazoneurotoprecall.expertinquiry.com/ for more details.

Products.Name: Amazon Basics Premium Foam Eurotop Mattresses

Images.Caption: Recalled Amazon Basics Premium Foam Eurotop Mattress
The Amazon Basics tag is located on the foot panel of the recalled mattress
The date of manufacture, SKU and prototype ID are on a white label on the center seam of the foot panel

Retailers.Name: Available on Amazon.com from January 2023 to June 2024, priced between $82 and $278

Distributors.Name: Amazon.com Services LLC, of Seattle, Washington

Hazards.Name: Fire hazard due to violation of federal mattress flammability standards

Remedies.Name: Immediate cessation of use and follow Amazon's refund process

recalls.metaDescription: Amazon recalls Premium Foam Eurotop Mattresses due to fire hazards. Follow refund instructions for safety.

recalls.Description: Crayan is recalling its 10-inch and 12-inch mattresses available in Twin, Full, Queen, and King sizes due to a serious fire hazard. These single-sided mattresses feature a white knit quilted top with the brand name 'Crayan' visible on the gray side panel and were sold compressed in a box. Details about fiber content, size, and 'WG/P Foundation' can be found on a white label sewn onto the mattress cover.
recalls.Title: Crayan Mattresses Recalled for Fire Hazard Risk; Fails Federal Flammability Standards
recalls.ConsumerContact: For assistance, customers can reach Crayan at 779-605-4458 from 5 p.m. to 11 p.m. PT, Monday through Friday, or via email at crayan_service@hotmail.com.

Images.Caption: Recalled Crayan Mattress
Recalled Crayan Mattress Labeling
Recalled Crayan Mattress Labeling
Recalled Crayan Mattress Labeling

Retailers.Name: Available online at Amazon.com from July 2022 through June 2024, priced between $100 and $220.

Distributors.Name: Foshanshi Liyue Jiaju Youxian Gongsi, dba Crayan Inc., of China

Hazards.Name: Failure to meet open flame flammability standards, creating a significant fire risk.

Remedies.Name: Consumers must cease use of the mattresses immediately and contact Crayan for a full refund. They will need to label the mattress with 'Recalled' in large letters on the white top panel and send a photo of the marked mattress to crayan_service@hotmail.com to confirm disposal before receiving their refund. The company is reaching out to all known buyers directly.

recalls.metaDescription: Crayan recalls mattresses for failing fire safety standards. Stop using immediately and contact for a refund. Learn more here.

recalls.Description: Agro Superior Group is recalling Oliver & Smith-branded 6-inch hybrid mattresses available in various sizes, including Twin, Twin-XL, Full, Short Full, Queen, Short Queen, King, and California King. These mattresses feature a white woven ticking with a wavy diamond design on top, white sides with a diamond pattern, and black bottoms. Labels on the mattresses indicate "Oliver & Smith", "PERFECT SLEEP", and "Organic", along with manufacturing details and compliance information.
recalls.Title: Agro Superior Group Issues Recall for Oliver & Smith Mattresses Due to Fire Hazard Risk
recalls.ConsumerContact: Consumers should immediately stop using the recalled mattresses and contact Agro Superior Group at 800-453-5856 from 9:30 a.m. to 4:30 p.m. ET, Monday through Friday, or via email at agrorecall@gmail.com.

Images.Caption: Recalled Oliver & Smith 6-inch Mattress
Recalled Oliver & Smith 6-inch Mattress side seam labels

Retailers.Name: Available online at www.Amazon.com from "Aylas Furniture Store" and www.Walmart.com from "OLIVER & SMITH SINCE 1921" between January 2024 and July 2024, priced between $90 and $180.

Importers.Name: Agro Superior Group LLC, of Princeton, New Jersey

Hazards.Name: Fire hazard due to violation of mattress flammability standards, posing serious injury or death risk.

Remedies.Name: Consumers can receive a free fitted cover to ensure compliance with federal flammability standards.

recalls.metaDescription: Recall of Oliver & Smith mattresses due to fire hazards. Contact Agro Superior Group for a free compliance cover.

recalls.Description: American Bolt and Screw is recalling tip-over restraint kits that were included with certain chests and dressers manufactured by Canyon Furniture. The kits, packaged in a red plastic bag, contain a plastic zip tie, two white brackets, four screws, two drywall anchors, and an instruction sheet. The bags are marked with the manufacturer’s details and specific production dates of June 20, 2023, or January 20, 2024. The affected furniture lines include Canyon Lake, Canyon River, Cottage Colors, Creekside 2.0, Ivy League 2.0, and Modern Colors. Each unit features a white label stating "Canyon Furniture Co." along with a model number starting with "CANY" and a manufacture date.
recalls.Title: Recall of Tip-Over Restraint Kits with Canyon Furniture Clothing Storage Units Due to Serious Safety Risks
recalls.ConsumerContact: Consumers should reach out to American Bolt and Screw via email at recall@absfasteners.com or visit www.ABStipoverecall.com. For additional assistance, contact Rooms To Go at 855-688-0919, Monday through Friday, 9 a.m. to 4 p.m. ET, or email productcare@roomstogo.com.

Images.Caption: Contents of Recalled Tip-over Restraint Kit
Safety Brackets Instruction Sheet
Red Bag Containing Recalled Tip-over Restraint Kit

Retailers.Name: Available at Rooms To Go stores and online at www.RoomsToGo.com from July 2023 through May 2024.

Importers.Name: American Bolt and Screw, of Ontario, California

Hazards.Name: Risk of tip-over and entrapment due to brittle zip ties potentially breaking.

Remedies.Name: Free replacement tip-over restraint kit available upon request.

recalls.metaDescription: Recall of tip-over restraint kits with Canyon Furniture units due to serious safety hazards. Contact for a free replacement kit.

recalls.Description: Avocado is recalling its Organic Cotton Mattress Pad Protectors, available in Twin, Twin XL, Full, Queen, King, and California King sizes. These mattress pads, featuring a quilted ivory design, are made from cotton ticking and cotton fiber fill. Each pad includes a law label with the model number "Model SFMPAVORG", along with details such as the manufacturer, delivery date, and washing instructions.
recalls.Title: Avocado Organic Cotton Mattress Pads Recalled for Fire Hazard Due to Flammability Regulation Violation
recalls.ConsumerContact: For assistance, consumers can reach Avocado Mattress at 844-326-5009 from 9 a.m. to 8 p.m. ET, Monday through Friday, or email safety@avocadomattress.com. More information is available at www.avocadogreenmattress.com/pages/recall or by visiting www.avocadogreenmattress.com and clicking on "Recall" at the bottom of the page.

Products.Name: Avocado Organic Cotton Mattress Pad Protectors

Images.Caption: Recalled Avocado Organic Cotton Mattress Pad Protector
Product Law label showing Model SFMPAVORG

Retailers.Name: Available at Avocado stores nationwide and online at www.avocadogreenmattress.com from January 2019 through March 2024, priced between $200 and $370.

Importers.Name: Avocado Mattress LLC (d/b/a Avocado Green Mattress), of Fullerton, California

Hazards.Name: Fire hazard due to violation of federal flammability regulations.

Remedies.Name: Consumers must stop using the mattress pads immediately and contact Avocado for a free replacement. They should cut the pad in half, date and initial the law label, and upload photos of the cut pad and label to www.avocadogreenmattress.com/pages/recall.

recalls.metaDescription: Avocado recalls Organic Cotton Mattress Pads due to fire hazards. Contact for free replacements and safety instructions.

recalls.Description: Adven Group is recalling all sizes and thicknesses of the Nap Queen Sleep Victoria Cooling Gel and Pocket Coil Hybrid Mattresses manufactured before October 2023. These mattresses, identified by model numbers including NQ691011, NQ691015, and NQ69841, feature a white knit top panel with a wavy diamond quilt pattern and a black woven quilted side panel. They were sold compressed in a box with black edges and yellow stitching, and the branding is displayed on a white label sewn onto the cover.
recalls.Title: Adven Group Recalls Nap Queen Sleep Victoria Hybrid Mattresses Due to Fire Hazard
recalls.ConsumerContact: For assistance, consumers can reach out to Nap Queen Sleep at 866-387-6239 from 9 a.m. to 5 p.m. CT, Monday through Friday, or email recall@napqueens.com. More information is available online at https://www.napqueensleep.com/pages/napqueen-victoria-hybrid-mattress-recall-program or by visiting www.napqueensleep.com and selecting 'Product Recall' at the top of the page.

Products.Name: Nap Queen Sleep Victoria Hybrid Mattresses

Images.Caption: Recalled Nap Queen Sleep Victoria Hybrid Mattress
Nap Queen Sleep, "Victoria Hybrid," the model number, and manufacture date appear on a white label sewn onto the mattress cover

Retailers.Name: Available at various retailers nationwide, including Amazon, Walmart, Home Depot, Wayfair, Target, Bed Bath & Beyond, and Napqueensleep.com from February 2020 to October 2023, priced between $160 and $375.

Importers.Name: Adven Group, dba Nap Queen Sleep, of Missouri City, Texas

Hazards.Name: Fire hazard due to violation of federal mattress flammability regulations.

Remedies.Name: Consumers should stop using the mattresses immediately and contact Nap Queen for a free fitted cover to ensure compliance with federal standards.

recalls.metaDescription: Adven Group recalls Nap Queen Sleep Victoria Hybrid Mattresses due to fire hazards. Contact for a free fitted cover to ensure safety.

recalls.Description: GhostBed is recalling its Natural mattresses, identifiable by model numbers starting with 13GBNAT or labeled 'Natural.' These mattresses, approximately 12 inches thick, feature an ivory quilted top and side panels with horizontal lines. Available in various sizes including Twin, Queen, and King, they have the GhostBed Natural logo embroidered in black and green. The manufacturing dates range from June 2021 to March 2023, with details found on a white label sewn into the mattress seam.
recalls.Title: GhostBed Natural Mattresses Recall Due to Fire Safety Violations
recalls.ConsumerContact: For assistance, consumers can reach GhostBed at 877-557-5335 from 9 a.m. to 10 p.m. ET, Monday to Friday, email GBnatural@ghostbed.com, or visit www.ghostbed.com/pages/product-recall for more information.

Images.Caption: Recalled GhostBed Natural Mattress

Manufacturers.Name: Innovative Bedding Solutions, of Buena Park, California

Retailers.Name: Available at GhostBed.com, GhostBedNatural.com, and other online retailers from June 2021 to March 2023, priced between $1,200 and $2,500.

Hazards.Name: Fire hazard due to non-compliance with federal mattress flammability standards.

Remedies.Name: Consumers should stop using the mattress immediately and contact GhostBed for a free compliance cover. GhostBed will also reach out to all known purchasers.

recalls.metaDescription: GhostBed recalls Natural mattresses due to fire safety violations. Contact for a free compliance cover to ensure safety.

recalls.Description: Sleep Technologies is recalling the ECO TERRA Eco Terra Mattresses produced between August 5 and August 18, 2022. These mattresses are 10 inches thick, featuring an ivory quilted top panel and a brown knit side panel with horizontal lines. The model name 'ECO TERRA' and manufacture dates can be found on the mattress label sewn into the cover. This recall is due to a violation of federal mattress flammability standards, which presents a fire hazard.
recalls.Title: Sleep Technologies Recalls Eco Terra Mattresses Due to Fire Safety Violations
recalls.ConsumerContact: For assistance, consumers can reach Sleep Technologies at 888-605-0409 from 8 a.m. to 6 p.m. PT, Monday through Friday, email support@ecoterrabeds.com, or visit https://ecoterrabeds.com/pages/recall for more details.

Images.Caption: Recalled Eco Terra Hybrid Latex Mattress
Recalled Eco Terra Hybrid Latex Mattress Label

Manufacturers.Name: Sleep Technologies Inc., d/b/a The Natural Latex Co. of Camarillo, California

Retailers.Name: Available for purchase online at Ecoterrabeds.com in August 2022 for approximately $900.

Hazards.Name: Fire hazard due to non-compliance with federal mattress flammability regulations.

Remedies.Name: Consumers should cease using the mattress immediately and contact Sleep Technologies to obtain a free cover that ensures compliance with safety regulations.

recalls.metaDescription: Sleep Technologies recalls Eco Terra Mattresses for fire safety violations. Contact them for a free compliance cover.

recalls.Description: Bokser Home is recalling all sizes of their 100% cotton mattress pads produced after October 2022 due to a fire hazard. These mattress pads feature a quilted box stitch pattern and are made entirely of cotton for both the shell and fill. Important manufacturing details, including the retailer's name, are indicated on a label attached to each mattress pad.
recalls.Title: Bokser Home Recalls 100% Cotton Mattress Pads for Fire Hazard Risk
recalls.ConsumerContact: For assistance, consumers can reach Bokser Home at 888-216-4403 from 9 a.m. to 5 p.m. CT, Monday through Friday, or via email at support@bokserhome.com. More information is available online at www.bokserhome.com/mattress-pad-recall/ or by visiting www.bokserhome.com and selecting 'Product Recall' at the bottom of the page.

Images.Caption: Recalled Bokser Home 100% Cotton Mattress Pad
Label Attached to Recalled Bokser Home 100% Cotton Mattress Pad

Manufacturers.Name: Anhui Zhongqinghonyu Home Textile Technology Co. LTD, of China

Retailers.Name: Available at Bed Bath & Beyond, Belk, Macy's, Target, Bokser Home Outlet, and Fernish B2B stores across the country, as well as online at BedBathandBeyond.com, BokserHome.com, and Bokserhomeoutlet.com from November 2022 to October 2023, priced between $25 and $145.

Hazards.Name: Fire hazard due to violation of federal flammability regulations for mattress pads.

Remedies.Name: Consumers must stop using the mattress pads immediately and contact Bokser Home for a full refund. They will need to destroy the product by cutting it and sending a photo of the destroyed item to support@bokserhome.com. A full refund will be issued upon receipt of the photo.

recalls.metaDescription: Bokser Home recalls 100% cotton mattress pads due to fire hazard risks. Contact for refunds and safety information.

recalls.Description: Savvy Rest has issued a recall for their quilted cotton mattress pads due to a significant fire hazard. These white mattress pads, made with unbleached cotton ticking and featuring corner ties, were available in various sizes including twin, twin XL, full, queen, king, and California king. Notably, these pads do not have any attached labels. This recall specifically pertains to the quilted cotton mattress pads only.
recalls.Title: Savvy Rest Recalls Quilted Cotton Mattress Pads Due to Fire Hazard
recalls.ConsumerContact: For more information, consumers can reach out to Savvy Rest at 866-856-4044 anytime, via email at info@savvyrest.com, or visit www.savvyrest.com/product-recall. Alternatively, consumers can go to https://www.savvyrest.com and click on 'Product Recall' at the bottom of the page.

Products.Name: Savvy Rest Quilted Cotton Mattress Pads

Images.Caption: Recalled Savvy Rest Quilted Cotton Mattress Pads
Recalled Savvy Rest Quilted Cotton Mattress Pads

Manufacturers.Name: Savvy Rest Inc., of Charlottesville, Virginia

Retailers.Name: Available online at savvyrest.com, thenaturalsleepstore.com, stlbeds.com, and organiquesleep.com, as well as in stores such as EcoDwelling, The Clean Bedroom NY, Natural Mattress, Moss Envy, ECO Sleep Solutions, Green Island, Eagles' Rest, Well Rested, and Billibeds across the country from April 2023 through October 2023, priced between $150 and $280.

Hazards.Name: Failure to meet federal flammability standards, posing a fire risk.

Remedies.Name: Consumers should immediately stop using the recalled mattress pads and contact Savvy Rest for a full refund. They will need to destroy the product by cutting it with scissors and send a photo of the destroyed pad to info@savvyrest.com. A full refund will be provided upon receipt of the photo.

recalls.metaDescription: Savvy Rest recalls quilted cotton mattress pads due to fire hazards. Learn how to get a refund and safely dispose of the product.

recalls.Description: Adven Group is recalling all sizes of the Nap Queen 12-inch Maxima Hybrid Mattress, which features Cooling Gel Memory Foam and Bonnell Springs. This mattress is identifiable by its model numbers NQIH12KK, NQIH12QQ, NQIH12FF, NQIH12TT, and NQIH12TX. It has a single-sided design with a white fabric ticking adorned with gray dots, a dark gray mesh stripe, and a wave quilted pattern on the sides, along with a straight-line quilted top. The label on the mattress indicates the model name 'Maxima' and the importer as Adven Group, LLC. These mattresses were sold compressed in a box format.
recalls.Title: Adven Group Recalls Nap Queen Maxima Hybrid Mattresses Due to Fire Safety Concerns
recalls.ConsumerContact: For assistance, contact Nap Queen at 866-387-6239 from 9 a.m. to 5 p.m. CT, Monday to Friday, or visit https://sleepqueens.myshopify.com/pages/napqueen-maxima-12-twin-size-mattress-recall or www.napqueensleep.com and click on the 'Product Recall' banner for further details.

Images.Caption: Recalled Nap Queen 12-inch Maxima Hybrid Mattress
Close-up of fabric patterns on side and top of the mattress

Retailers.Name: Available on Amazon.com, Walmart.com, and Overstock.com from February 2023 to May 2023, priced between $170 and $350.

Importers.Name: Adven Group LLC, of Missouri City, Texas

Hazards.Name: Failure to meet federal flammability standards, creating a fire risk.

Remedies.Name: Consumers should cease use of the mattresses and contact Nap Queen for a complimentary fitted cover to ensure compliance with safety standards.

recalls.metaDescription: Adven Group recalls Nap Queen Maxima Hybrid Mattresses due to fire hazard. Contact for a free fitted cover to ensure safety compliance.
